name: migration-harness
description: Staged, ledger-tracked codebase migrations — discover sites, classify mechanical vs judgment, batch-escalate contested decisions with a mechanical block-until-signed-off gate, fan out transforms over partitioned file sets, verify each site mechanically, and gate completion. Use when migrating many call sites/modules/configs to a new invariant: rename or removal sweeps, boundary re-authoring, config reconciliation, visibility sweeps.
